qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT max(PE.c_empresa) as c_empresa, MAX(PE.c_categoria_ult) as c_categoria_ult, MAX(PE.c_sindicato) as c_sindicato, MAX(PE.f_ingreso) as f_ingreso, PE.e_numero_legajo, MAX(PER.c_nro_cuil) as c_nro_cuil, MAX(PER.oi_personal) as oi_personal, MAX(PER.d_apellido) as d_apellido, MAX(PER.d_nombres) as d_nombres, max(TLP.oi_tot_liq_per) as oi_tot_liq_per, MAX(LIQ.e_periodo) as e_periodo, MAX(LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo) as oi_liquidacion_ddo, MAX(CAT.d_categoria) as d_categoria, MAX(PEREMP.l_afiliado_sind) as l_afiliado_sind, MAX(ORG19.d_localidad) as d_localidad, MAX(ORG35.c_provincia) as c_provincia, MAX(V.{%=#VAR:@c_columna%}) as n_totsret, MAX(PER01_DOM.d_calle) as d_calle, MAX(PER01_DOM.e_numero) as e_numero, MAX(PER01_DOM.d_departamento) as d_departamento, MAX(PER01_DOM.d_piso) as d_piso FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PEREMP, PER30_SINDICATOS as S, ORG03_UBICACIONES AS UBI, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP, ORG19_LOCALIDADES AS ORG19, PER01_DOMIC_PER AS PER01_DOM, ORG35_PROVINCIAS AS ORG35, ORG18_CATEGORIAS AS CAT, LIQ20_VAR_GR_CONC as V JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PE.c_personal INNER PER.c_personal, PER.oi_personal INNER PEREMP.oi_personal, PEREMP.oi_categoria_ult INNER CAT.oi_categoria, PE.c_sindicato INNER S.c_sindicato, PE.c_ubicacion INNER UBI.c_ubicacion, UBI.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, UBI.oi_localidad INNER ORG19.oi_localidad, ORG19.oi_provincia INNER ORG35.oi_provincia, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, V.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, PER01_DOM.oi_localidad INNER ORG19.oi_localidad , PEREMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_DOM.oi_personal WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@p_periodo} AND EMP.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND S.oi_sindicato = {#SOURCE:@oi_sindicato} AND V.c_grupo = \'4\' GROUP BY PE.e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_def_variables_grupos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna, LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable WHERE LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'4\' and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable = \'aa_remtotalsind\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_aporte_smata
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(CL.n_valor) AS n_valor FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CDDO, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as C, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CONSUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CDDO.oi_concepto_ddo, CDDO.c_concepto INNER C.c_concepto, C.oi_concepto INNER CONSUM.oi_concepto, CONSUM.oi_total INNER TOT.oi_total WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND TOT.c_total = \'Aporte_Smata\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_otaporte_smata
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(CL.n_valor) AS n_valor FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CDDO, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as C, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CONSUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CDDO.oi_concepto_ddo, CDDO.c_concepto INNER C.c_concepto, C.oi_concepto INNER CONSUM.oi_concepto, CONSUM.oi_total INNER TOT.oi_total WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND TOT.c_total = \'OtAporte_Smata\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_sac_smata
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(CL.n_valor) AS n_valor FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CDDO, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as C, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CONSUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CDDO.oi_concepto_ddo, CDDO.c_concepto INNER C.c_concepto, C.oi_concepto INNER CONSUM.oi_concepto, CONSUM.oi_total INNER TOT.oi_total WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND TOT.c_total = \'SAC_Smata\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_noREm_smata
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(CL.n_valor) AS n_valor FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CDDO, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as C, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CONSUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CDDO.oi_concepto_ddo, CDDO.c_concepto INNER C.c_concepto, C.oi_concepto INNER CONSUM.oi_concepto, CONSUM.oi_total INNER TOT.oi_total WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND TOT.c_total = \'NOREM_Smata\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_interfaces_categoria
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT CAT.c_interface FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CAT WHERE CAT.c_categoria = {#PARAM:@c_categoria_ult} AND LEN(CAT.c_interface) > 0 ')/ROWS/ROW
